name: SocialBee
description:
What SocialBee Does

SocialBee is a Pinterest posts scheduler that allows you to plan, schedule, and publish both pins and boards directly to your Pinterest account without leaving the platform. Its ability to bulk schedule and integration with stock images for visually engaging content makes it a viable tool for social media-based businesses. You can track the performance of your Pinterest content through their dashboard.

Source: SocialBee

Key Features

  • Gets recommendations on the best posting time to maximize reach
  • Creates high-quality content by integration with services like GIPHY, Unsplash, etc. 
  • Leverages an AI-powered content generator to make sure your calendar is filled with engaging post 

Benefits of SocialBee

  • Creates efficient content with AI assistance 
  • Produces visually appealing content with integration with design tools 
  • Saves time 

Pricing

  • $82 per month 

Pros

  • Saves significant time and resources 
  • Can bulk schedule multiple pins and boards at once

Cons

  • No option for pin or board editing directly on their platform
summing_up_description:
Summing Up

Managing multiple Pinterest accounts and posting content every day to stay updated on Pinterest can be stressful. That is why you need to leverage the expertise of a platform that can help you schedule a Pinterest post. 

We have identified the most reliable and professional Pinterest schedulers for your business. All you need to do is choose the best option for your business needs and budget. 

Get Started With Synup Social

Synup Social is arguably one of the most trusted programs and one of the best Pinterest schedulers. By partnering with them, you can ensure that your Pinterest posts reach a wider audience, thereby increasing your engagement rate. Synup Social's white-label options will also satisfy your clients.

‍

FAQs 

  1. How many times can I post on Pinterest a day?

Pinterest does not limit the number of pins you can post a day. However, it does have a spam regulation system that may ban your account if your post goes against Pinterest community standards. 

  1. How long does a Pinterest post last?

Unless the owner deletes them, the pins last forever. Relevant pins can continue to resurface even years after being posted. 

  1. How many pins can I schedule on a Pinterest post scheduler? 

Though you can only schedule one pin at a time, you can have up to one hundred pins queued up for the future.

‍
